_comment: Real CloudTrail events captured 2026-04-16 from an 'aws sso login' (device authorization) session.
_notes: aws sso login uses device_code grant: CLI polls sso.amazonaws.com/CreateToken until browser auth completes.
Credentials are NOT in the CreateToken response — they are fetched separately via GetRoleCredentials.
GetRoleCredentials fires with IdentityCenterUser identity (bearer token, no ARN/principalId).
The credentialId on GetRoleCredentials is the bearer token ID — links the SSO session to the STS credentials.
onBehalfOf.userId is the stable Identity Store user ID (survives the July 2025 principalId deprecation).
All subsequent API calls are AssumedRole on AWSReservedSSO_* role — identical to aws login sessions.
Distinguishing aws sso login vs aws login: eventSource (sso.amazonaws.com vs signin.amazonaws.com) and eventName (CreateToken vs CreateOAuth2Token).

Records._comment: Step 1a-c: CLI polls until browser auth completes. First two have empty responseElements (pending), last has tokens.
Records.userAgent: aws-cli/2.34.30 md/awscrt#0.31.2 ua/2.1 os/macos#25.2.0 md/arch#arm64 lang/python#3.14.4 md/pyimpl#CPython m/Z,E,b cfg/retry-mode#standard md/installer#exe sid/ceb415febc00 md/prompt#off md/command#sso.login

Records._comment: Step 1c: Final poll — browser auth complete. responseElements contains accessToken/refreshToken (hidden by CloudTrail).
Records.userAgent: aws-cli/2.34.30 md/awscrt#0.31.2 ua/2.1 os/macos#25.2.0 md/arch#arm64 lang/python#3.14.4 md/pyimpl#CPython m/Z,E,b cfg/retry-mode#standard md/installer#exe sid/ceb415febc00 md/prompt#off md/command#sso.login

Records._comment: Step 2: Bearer token exchanged for STS creds. credentialId here is the LONG format bearer token (different from CreateToken credentialId). This is the bridge event — fires at same second as first AssumedRole call.
Records._correlation: credentialId links SSO session to STS session. onBehalfOf.userId is stable user identifier post July-2025 deprecation.
Records.userAgent: aws-cli/2.34.30 md/awscrt#0.31.2 ua/2.1 os/macos#25.2.0 md/arch#arm64 lang/python#3.14.4 md/pyimpl#CPython m/Z,E,t,b cfg/retry-mode#standard md/installer#exe sid/e15370b661ab md/prompt#off md/command#sts.get-caller-identity

Records._comment: Step 3: First API call using the vended credentials. creationDate matches GetRoleCredentials.eventTime exactly.
Records.userAgent: aws-cli/2.34.30 md/awscrt#0.31.2 ua/2.1 os/macos#25.2.0 md/arch#arm64 lang/python#3.14.4 md/pyimpl#CPython m/u,Z,E,t,b cfg/retry-mode#standard md/installer#exe sid/e15370b661ab md/prompt#off md/command#sts.get-caller-identity

Records._comment: Step 4: Subsequent API call — same accessKeyId, same creationDate.
Records.userAgent: [aws-cli/2.34.30 md/awscrt#0.31.2 ua/2.1 os/macos#25.2.0 md/arch#arm64 lang/python#3.14.4 md/pyimpl#CPython m/u,Z,E,C,t,b cfg/retry-mode#standard md/installer#exe sid/e15370b661ab md/prompt#off md/command#s3.ls]
